sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN name1 WHEN '2' THEN name2 WHEN '3' THEN name3 WHEN '4' THEN name4 END name, width, colname FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND LISTTYPE = #listCode# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

SELECT boardid, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (boardname2 = '' OR boardname2 IS NULL) THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END END boardname, treevieworder, boardlevel, parentboardid, boarddescription, itemexpires, attachsizelimit, replynotify, boardgroupid, alertpostitem, gubun, url, deleteafter, boardno, portlet, onelinereply, boardtreepath, formlocation, formflag, apprflag, apprmailflag, attributeyn, tenant_id, COMPANYID, MAILFG_POST, MAILFG_MOD, MAILFG_COMMENT, USEKEYWORD, ATTACHMENTFLAG, PUBLICFLAG, ALLNEWBOARDFLAG, STARRATINGFLAG, VERSIONMANAGE FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#

SELECT boardid, accessid, accesslevel, access_, parentboardid, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, reply_fg, delete_fg, inherit_fg, postnotice, boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND accessid = #userDeptPath#
AND boardgroupacl = 'Y'
LIMIT 1

SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid AND ( CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL ) ) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)
AND ( A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
)
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND D.totalcount IS NULL
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate < #nowDate#
AND parentwritedate = #parentWriteDate#
AND upperitemidtree > #upperitemidtree#
UNION SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid AND ( CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL ) ) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)
AND ( A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
)
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND parentwritedate < #parentWriteDate#
ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, UPPERITEMIDTREE LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT A.boardid , A.itemid , A.writerid , A.writername , A.writerdeptname , A.writercompanyname , DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance , A.title , A.readcount , A.attachments , A.itemlevel , A.abstract , '0' readflag , A.extensionattribute5 , A.writername2 , A.writerdeptname2 , A.writercompanyname2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.ITEMID AND ( CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL ) ) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, A.extensionattribute2 notice, A.notino, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) as gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND NTSTARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND NTENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1'
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.NotiNo ASC, A.parentwritedate DESC, A.writedate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT DISTINCT B.apprflag FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = #boardID#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(A.itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
)
AND apprflag = 'Y'
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)

SELECT COUNT(A.itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND D.totalcount IS NULL
AND apprflag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardDd# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND apprflag = 'Y'

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(itemid) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND extensionattribute1 = '0' AND extensionattribute2 = '1'

SELECT A.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, B.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID AND ( CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL ) ) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY)
AND A.writedate < #lastDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND A.writedate < #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND ( A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
)
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND S.USERID = #userID# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY))) ORDER BY A.writedate DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT A.BOARDID , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END boardname, A.BOARDNAME2 , TABUSED , B.GUBUN FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (B.COMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (USERID = #userID# OR (USERID = 'everyone' AND A.BOARDID <> '{FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}')) AND TABUSED = 'Y' ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

SELECT A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID,
A.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 AS WRITERCOMPANYNAME,
A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME,
A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.CONTENTLOCATION, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.ABSTRACT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.COPIEDITEM, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE32 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.MAINCONTENT, A.APPRFLAG, B.GUBUN, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, A.BOARDID, A.DOCNO, NTSTARTDATE notiStart, NTENDDATE notiEnd, A.PUBLICFLAG, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME END AS UPDATERNAME, A.UPDATEDATE FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON A.UPDATERID = U.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.ITEMID = #itemID#

select.isEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# ) )
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = ReadCount + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET UpdateDate = #writeDate#, Importance = #importance#, Title = #title#,
Attachments = #hasAttach#,
WriterName = #writerName#, WriterName2 = #writerName2#,
updaterID = #updaterID#,
updateDate = #updateDate#, ExtensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2#, ExtensionAttribute5 = #extensionAttribute5#, DocPassWord = #docPassword#, extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6#, extensionAttribute7 = #extensionAttribute7#, extensionAttribute8 = #extensionAttribute8#, extensionAttribute9 = #extensionAttribute9#, extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10#, content = #content#, ntstartdate = #notiStart#, ntenddate = #notiEnd#, publicFlag = #publicFlag# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor , A.Gubun , B.BOARDGROUPACL BOARDGROUPACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor , A.Gubun , B.BOARDGROUPACL BOARDGROUPACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id, C.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID#
AND (C.AccessID = #userID# OR C.AccessID = 'guestPermit' ) AND D.ParentBoardID = #rootBoardID#
AND C.BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND (B.TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR B.TYPE IS NULL) )
UNION
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor , A.Gubun , B.BOARDGROUPACL BOARDGROUPACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id, C.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON C.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND C.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #userID# AND D.ParentBoardID = #rootBoardID# AND C.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND B.TYPE = 'GROUP' )
ORDER BY TreeViewOrder ASC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.companyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.COMPANYID) = '' OR A.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.companyid = #companyID#) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC)
UNION
(SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END END BoardName, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A
JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id, C.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# AND C.AccessID = #userID# AND D.ParentBoardID = #rootBoardID#
AND C.BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (TRIM(A.companyid) = '' OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID#
AND (B.TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR B.TYPE IS NULL)
ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC)
UNION
(SELECT DISTINCT AG.BoardID , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN AG.boardname ELSE CASE WHEN (AG.boardname2 = '' OR AG.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN AG.boardname ELSE AG.boardname2 END END BoardName, AG.TreeViewOrder , AG.BoardColor BoardColor, AG.Gubun , '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo AG
JOIN ( SELECT CG.BoardID , CG.AccessID , CG.Access_ , CG.BoardGroupACL , CG.tenant_id, CG.TYPE FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage CG LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo DG ON CG.TENANT_ID = DG.TENANT_ID AND CG.BoardID = DG.BoardID
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON CG.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND CG.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE CG.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CG.Access_ = 1 AND CG.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #userID# AND DG.ParentBoardID = #rootBoardID# AND CG.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
) BG ON AG.TENANT_ID = BG.TENANT_ID AND AG.BoardID = BG.BOARDID
WHERE AG.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (TRIM(AG.companyid) = '' OR AG.companyid IS NULL) AND AG.PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID# AND AG.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID#
AND BG.TYPE = 'GROUP'
ORDER BY AG.TreeViewOrder ASC)

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(AccessID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BoardAdmin_FG = 'true' AND (AccessID = #userID# OR AccessID = #deptID# OR AccessID = #companyID# OR ACCESSID IN ( SELECT AM.DEPTID FROM tbl_usermaster UM INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER AM ON UM.TENANT_ID = AM.TENANT_ID AND UM.CN = AM.CN AND UM.CN = #userID# AND UM.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON UM.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID AND AM.DEPTID = DM.CN AND DM.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE UM.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )) AND BoardID = IFNULL(( SELECT BoardGroupID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND BoardID = #boardID# ), #boardID#)
SELECT CONCAT(BOARDID, ';') BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ACCESS_ = 0 AND ACCESSID = #accessID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND UserID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = P.boardid AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND S.USERID = #userID# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY)))
WHERE A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_MyBoards ( USERID, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TREEVIEWNUM, VIEWORDER, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #userID# USERID , BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , ( SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) + 1 FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userID# ), ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(VIEWORDER) IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE MAX(VIEWORDER) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userID# ), TENANT_ID, '*' as COMPANYID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# )
insert.isNotEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_MyBoards ( USERID, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TREEVIEWNUM, VIEWORDER, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #userID# USERID , BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , ( SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) + 1 FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userID# ), ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(VIEWORDER) IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE MAX(VIEWORDER) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #userID# ), TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# )

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE USERID = #userID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE USERID = #userID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID# ORDER BY GUID
SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) as deptPathCode FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #departmentID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IMAGEID , FILEPATH , FILECONTENT , MAIN_FLAG FLAG , IMAGENAME FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND BoardID = #boardID# ORDER BY WriteDate ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND BoardID = #boardID#
SELECT APPRFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND apprFlag = 'C' AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = 0 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT result2 result FROM TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CONCAT(BOARDID, ';') BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESS_ = 0 AND ACCESSID = #v_PACCESSID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PROOTBOARDID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT AM.DEPTID FROM tbl_usermaster UM INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER AM ON UM.TENANT_ID = AM.TENANT_ID AND UM.CN = AM.CN AND UM.CN = #v_pUserID# INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON UM.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID AND AM.DEPTID = DM.CN AND DM.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_pCompanyID# WHERE UM.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE CN = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

(SELECT accessid, accesslevel, access_, parentboardid, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, reply_fg, delete_fg, inherit_fg, postnotice, boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND accessid = #userDeptPath# AND (TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR TYPE IS NULL)
AND boardgroupacl = 'Y'
)
UNION
(SELECT accessid, accesslevel, access_, parentboardid, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, reply_fg, delete_fg, inherit_fg, postnotice, PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN AS boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE TBB
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON TBB.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND TBB.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE TBB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #userDeptPath# AND TBB.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
)

SELECT COUNT(itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
)
AND apprflag = 'Y'
AND ( TOPWRITERID = #userID# OR WRITERID = #userID# OR (EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' AND NTSTARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND NTENDDATE > #nowDate#) )

SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid AND ( CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL ) ) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
AND ( A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
)
AND parentwritedate = #parentWriteDate#
AND upperitemidtree > #upperitemidtree#
AND ( TOPWRITERID = #userID# OR WRITERID = #userID# OR (EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' AND NTSTARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND NTENDDATE > #nowDate#) )
UNION SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid AND ( CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL ) ) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
AND ( A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%')
OR A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE K.KEYWORDNAME like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #pSearchText#), '%') AND BK.BOARDID = #boardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
)
AND parentwritedate < #parentWriteDate#
AND ( TOPWRITERID = #userID# OR WRITERID = #userID# OR (EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' AND NTSTARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND NTENDDATE > #nowDate#) )
ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, UPPERITEMIDTREE LIMIT #listSize#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY SET CONTENT = #CONTENT#, IMAGECONTENT = #IMAGECONTENT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #CONTENTID# AND REPLYID = #REPLYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY ( itemid, replyid, boardid, userid, username, username2, writedate, content, password, parentreplyid, parentwritername, replylevel, tenant_id, companyid, imageContent ) SELECT #PITEMID#, #PREPLYID#, #PBOARDID#, #USERID#, #USERNAME#, #USERNAME2#, #nowDate#, #PCONTENT#, #PPASSWORD# , #PARENTREPLYID#, USERNAME, (IFNULL(replylevel, 1) + 1), #TENANTID#, #COMPANYID#, #IMAGECONTENT# FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE REPLYID = #PARENTREPLYID# AND ITEMID = #PITEMID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE REPLYID = #REPLYID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #PITEMID# AND USERNAME IS NOT NULL;
SELECT GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #BOARDID#

SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P INNER JOIN TBL_Board_Item A ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N')

SELECT A.BOARDID, P.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS STARTDATE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, P.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT, P.BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N') GROUP BY A.ITEMID, A.TITLE
AND A.WRITEDATE < #lastDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP E ON A.BOARDID = E.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = E.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND E.USERID = #userID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND E.BOARDID IN #scrapBoardListView_FG[]#
AND 1 = 0
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY E.scrapdate DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.USERID = #userID# AND B.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND B.BOARDID IN #scrapBoardListView_FG[]#
AND 1 = 0
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = P.boardid AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL IFNULL((SELECT ALLNEWBOARDLISTDATE FROM TBL_BOARD_CONFIGURATION WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#), 5) DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND P.ALLNEWBOARDFLAG = 'Y'
WHERE (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))

SELECT A.BOARDID, P.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, P.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL IFNULL((SELECT ALLNEWBOARDLISTDATE FROM TBL_BOARD_CONFIGURATION WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#), 5) DAY) AND P.ALLNEWBOARDFLAG = 'Y'
AND A.writedate < #lastDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND A.writedate < #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR A.writerName LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY A.writedate DESC LIMIT #listSize#
